description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in blue from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 24cmWidth: 30cmDepth: 11cmMade of synthetic leather for durability, quilted with heart and flower pattern for high-fashion styleHas two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pocketsTwo handles attached to the bag with plaited loops, alternate long strap providedThree zipper pocket on front and two pockets fastened with magnet closureZipped pockets on back and sidesMetal stud feet on baseRound metal zip pulls for style and ease of useCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
